title: SlayTheSpire2RunFileV9
description: Top-level shape of the StS2 run-file export (informally 'v9'). Field set was derived from the real samples committed at references/run-samples/ — those are the canonical examples. Nested shapes inside `acts`, `players`, and `map_point_history` are not yet enforced and may be tightened in later milestones. `additionalProperties` stays `true` for the EA window since the game may add fields between patches.

schema_version.description: Game-emitted schema version. Observed values: 8 (older patch) and 9 (current). Not enforced strictly — the importer maps both.

start_time.description: Unix epoch seconds at run start.

run_time.description: Total duration in seconds. Importer derives end time as start_time + run_time.

was_abandoned.description: True if the player abandoned the run. Combined with `win`, encodes outcome: (false,true)=victory, (false,false)=defeat, (true,*)=abandoned.

win.description: True if the run reached a victory condition.

killed_by_encounter.description: Encounter id that killed the run, e.g. "ENCOUNTER.PHANTASMAL_GARDENERS_ELITE". "NONE.NONE" when not applicable.

killed_by_event.description: Event id that killed the run. "NONE.NONE" when not applicable.

acts.description: Ordered list of acts the run progressed through. Inner shape not enforced yet.

players.description: Per-player state at run end (single-player runs have one element). Inner shape not enforced yet.

map_point_history.description: Per-act sequence of map points visited and their outcomes. Inner shape not enforced yet.

modifiers.description: Run modifiers (daily climb, custom seed, etc.). Inner shape not enforced yet.
